subject: Clobbopus — a round pinkish-orange octopus Pokemon on a coastal beach setting with flowers and a smaller companion creature nearby
description: The card art shows a round, pinkish-orange octopus-like Pokemon creature sitting on a rocky coastal shore. The creature has a smooth round body and multiple short tentacles. Small flowers or plants are visible around the foreground, and a smaller dark-colored creature is visible in the background to the right. The setting is a bright coastal area with warm natural lighting, suggesting daytime outdoors. The mood is lighthearted and curious, matching the species' flavor text describing investigative behavior.
foreground: round pink-orange octopus creature on rocky coastal ground with small flowers
background: coastal rocky shore, small dark companion creature, bright sky
